sentences.arabic: طَلَبَ الْمُعَلِّمُ مِنَ الطُّلَّابِ أَنْ يَعْمَلُوا مَعًا فِي مَجْمُوعَاتٍ.
sentences.translation: Učitelj je zamolio učenike da rade zajedno u grupama.
sentences.translationEn: The teacher asked the students to work together in groups.

sentences.arabic: فِي الْبِدَايَةِ لَمْ يَتَّفِقْ بَعْضُ الطُّلَّابِ.
sentences.translation: U početku se neki učenici nisu složili.
sentences.translationEn: At first some of the students did not agree.

sentences.arabic: ثُمَّ تَكَلَّمُوا وَاسْتَمَعُوا إِلَى بَعْضِهِمُ الْبَعْضِ.
sentences.translation: Zatim su razgovarali i slušali jedni druge.
sentences.translationEn: Then they talked and listened to each other.
Working together makes the result better.
